description: Learn how to grill safely and effectively.

steps.instruction: Prepare your grill and preheat it to medium-high heat.
Season your meat or vegetables before placing them on the grill.
Place the food on the grill and close the lid.
Flip the food halfway through cooking for even grilling.
Use a meat thermometer to check for doneness.
Let the food rest before serving.

safety_tips: Always use long-handled tools to avoid burns.
Keep a spray bottle of water nearby for flare-ups.
Never leave the grill unattended while in use.
